message.content:
# SUBAGENT TASK: TASK-022

## CONTEXT
You are a subagent researching railway maintenance software.

## OBJECTIVE
Research SignatureRail software and its interface/approach.

## SEARCHES TO PERFORM
1. "SignatureRail railway software"
2. "SignatureRail maintenance"
3. "SignatureRail fleet management"
4. "SignatureRail screenshots"

## WHAT TO EXTRACT
- Interface screenshots descriptions
- Main functionalities
- Visualization approach
- Technologies used (if available)

## OUTPUT FORMAT
Save to: /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms-last-attempt/subagents/results/20260106-TASK-022.jsonl

Each JSONL line:
{"task_id": "TASK-022", "timestamp": "...", "finding_type": "feature|ui|tech", "source_url": "...", "content": "...", "relevance": "high|medium|low"}

## RESTRICTIONS
- ONLY perform web searches
- DO NOT execute code
- Use Write tool to save the JSONL output file

Links: [{"title":"Signature Rail - Trusted by the world's complex railways","url":"https://signaturerail.com/"},{"title":"Signature Rail | LinkedIn","url":"https://uk.linkedin.com/company/signature-rail"},{"title":"Planning Solutions - Signature Rail","url":"https://signaturerail.com/planning-solutions/"},{"title":"Signature Rail - Rail Forum","url":"https://www.railforum.uk/members/signature-rail/"},{"title":"Signature Rail - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com","url":"https://www.zoominfo.com/c/signature-rail/481547896"},{"title":"On-the-Day Solutions - Signature Rail","url":"https://signaturerail.com/on-the-day-solutions/"},{"title":"About Us - Signature Rail","url":"https://signaturerail.com/about-us/"},{"title":"Resources - Signature Rail","url":"https://signaturerail.com/resources/"},{"title":"#WeAreModaxo - Signature Rail","url":"https://signaturerail.com/we-are-modaxo/"},{"title":"SimSig Home Page | SimSig - Simulator of Railway Signalling Systems","url":"https://www.simsig.co.uk/"}]

Based on my search results, here's what I found about SignatureRail railway software:

## Signature Rail Overview

Signature Rail are specialists in planning software, used by train operating companies to generate robust conflict-free train timetables and validated resource plans.

### What They Do

Signature Rail provides software for train timetable and resource planning, including vehicle and crew plans. Their systems support long-term strategic timetable planning, mid and short-term tactical adjustments to planned timetables, operational planning and 'on the day' disruption management to deliver the planned timetable.

### Experience and Expertise

They are railway people with 30 years of knowledge and experience in timetable and resource planning software. As specialists in project management, software testing and development of railway timetable systems, they understand the challenges and complexity train operating companies face.

### Global Presence

Signature Rail software systems are in operational use with railways across the globe, including in Norway, Sweden, United Kingdom, Australia, USA, and Canada.

### Products

The TrainPlan and RailPlan solutions are part of a complete Enterprise Rail suite that includes Power Modelling, Rostering, and On-the-Day management of Stock and Crew.

### Company History

The company was previously known as Trapeze Group Rail after acquisition by Volaris Group, and later rebranded as Signature Rail to ensure a laser focus on their Rail customers and their needs.

### Location

Signature Rail is headquartered at 6 St. Mary's Court, Blossom Street, York, YO24 1AH.

### Parent Company

Modaxo is Constellation Software's (TSX: CSU) people transportation portfolio, with a mission to enable the daily movement of 1 billion people by 2030.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

Links: [{"title":"On-the-Day Operations and Disruption Management","url":"https://signaturerail.com/on-the-day-solutions/"},{"title":"Rail Fleet Management: How Technologies Help Handle Asset Tr","url":"https://www.altexsoft.com/blog/rail-fleet-management/"},{"title":"Railnova: Railway Fleet Management and predictive maintenance","url":"https://www.railnova.eu/"},{"title":"Signature Rail - Trusted by the world's complex railways","url":"https://signaturerail.com/"},{"title":"Planning Solutions - Signature Rail","url":"https://signaturerail.com/planning-solutions/"},{"title":"Rail Logistics Services - RSI Logistics","url":"https://www.rsilogistics.com/rail-solutions/rail-logistic-services/"},{"title":"Rail Fleet Management Industry Solutions | Holman","url":"https://www.holman.com/fleet-solutions/rail-fleet-management/"},{"title":"Welcome to MyKLS - Rail Fleet Management","url":"http://www.klsglobal.com/CoSvcRailFltMngmt.aspx"},{"title":"RailSmart IFM - Software systems - Velociti Solutions","url":"https://www.velociti-solutions.com/solutions-rail/railsmart-ifm-rail-incident-management-software/"},{"title":"Fleet Management - Fleet planning in rail operations","url":"https://db-eco.us/en/services/fleet-management/"}]

Based on the search results, here's what I found about SignatureRail and maintenance fleet management:

## Signature Rail - Fleet Management Solutions

Signature Rail enables customers to make assured and fully informed decisions that reduce costs, carbon footprint and risk, ensuring operations can be delivered in line with management KPIs and passenger expectations – even during periods of the most intense disruption.

### On-the-Day Operations and Fleet Management

Replacement trains go through an optimised process that considers the maintenance status of every train and the geographical location of suitable drivers.(no content)Their tools ensure that rail controllers have a high degree of confidence in their actions and decisions on-the-day, and downstream systems receive trusted information that can be depended upon to run a railway.

Key capabilities include:
- Using visual dashboards to take action and keep trains running, locating and assigning the right replacement trains as disruptions arise, and executing contingency plans in response to emergencies or weather events.
- Trains can be de-assigned and re-assigned in response to track disruption in real time, for example landslip, flood, broken-down freight train, fallen trees or escaped livestock, trespass, power failure or signalling failure.

### Planning Solutions

Signature Rail provides tracking of fuel, maintenance distances and crew hours and costs.(no content)With Signature Rail, planners and controllers within the rail operations centre are able to retain control over the safe operation of train schedules by managing the availability of trains and crew – even during times of major disruption with rapidly changing circumstances.(no content)Their system provides everything needed to make the right decisions: drivers, trains, maintenance status and more. Users can identify potential issues and save them as contingency layers - so when something happens on the day, they're already two steps ahead.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

content.content:
# SignatureRail On-the-Day Solutions

Based on the webpage content provided, here's what I can extract about SignatureRail's on-the-day solutions:

## Core Functionality
The platform enables "planners and controllers to retain control over the safe operation of train schedules." This represents the primary value proposition for railway operations management.

## Page Structure & Features
The website uses Elementor page builder with multiple sections showcasing:
- Service overview and benefits
- Icon-based feature explanations
- Customer testimonials in carousel format
- Related blog posts/case studies
- Call-to-action elements

## Technical Stack
The platform is built using:
- **WordPress** as the CMS foundation
- **Elementor** as the page builder (version 2082)
- **Roboto font** for typography throughout
- Responsive design supporting desktop, tablet, and mobile viewports

## Design Elements
- Primary color scheme: Blue (#0073BE) and gold accents (#EAAB00)
- Dark secondary colors (#54595F, #484848) for contrast
- Professional enterprise layout with structured information hierarchy

## Notable Omission
The extracted content focuses on page structure and styling rather than specific dashboard visualizations or detailed technical specifications of the on-the-day solution features themselves. The actual feature details appear to be in the rendered page content rather than the HTML/CSS provided.

content.content:
# Signature Rail Planning Solutions - Information Extract

## Core Purpose
Signature Rail's planning solutions enable train schedulers to "easily produce timetables taking into consideration all required resources and constraints."

## Interface & Features
The page demonstrates a comprehensive approach to rail scheduling with several key functional areas:

**Planning Capabilities:**
- Resource allocation and constraint management
- Timetable generation and optimization
- Multi-factor scheduling considerations

**Visual Design:**
The interface employs a clean, professional layout with:
- Icon-based feature representation
- Info list layouts with numbered connectors showing workflow progression
- Sections highlighting different solution aspects
- Testimonial carousels for customer feedback
- Blog/case study integration showcasing implementation details

## Technology Stack
The underlying architecture includes:

- **Frontend:** Elementor page builder with custom CSS styling
- **Framework:** WordPress-based CMS
- **Design System:** Roboto font family, custom color scheme (primary: #0073BE, accent: #F09A29)
- **Components:** Schema.org structured data markup, responsive grid layouts

## Visualization Approach
The solution uses progressive information disclosure, combining explanatory icon boxes with numbered sequential steps to guide users through solution features and benefits.

content.content:
# Signature Rail Software Analysis

Based on the web page content provided, here's what I found about Signature Rail's offerings:

## Company Overview
Signature Rail describes itself as "Trusted by the world's complex railways" and provides "Technology solutions for people with a railway to run."

## Core Value Proposition
The company emphasizes building "strong and trusted partnerships" while delivering "the best rail 'software-for-life' available." This suggests long-term, stable software solutions designed specifically for railway operations.

## Product Positioning
- **Enterprise focus**: Described as "Enterprise Rail Solutions"
- **Specialization**: The software targets complex railway operations and management
- **Longevity emphasis**: The "software-for-life" messaging indicates commitment to sustained product support

## Technical Presentation
The website uses Elementor page builder with Roboto typography and a professional color scheme (primary blue #0073BE, secondary grays). The design includes:
- Professional layout with multiple content sections
- Support for various media formats
- Responsive design for different devices

## Notable Gaps
The provided content does not contain detailed information about:
- Specific software features or modules
- User interface descriptions
- Technical specifications
- Pricing models
- Case studies or implementation details

The material appears to be homepage content focused on brand positioning rather than technical product documentation.

Web search results for query: "SignatureRail TrainPlan RailPlan software features interface"

Links: [{"title":"Signature Rail - Trusted by the world's complex railways","url":"https://signaturerail.com/"},{"title":"Planning Solutions - Signature Rail","url":"https://signaturerail.com/planning-solutions/"},{"title":"About Us - Signature Rail","url":"https://signaturerail.com/about-us/"},{"title":"Resources - Signature Rail","url":"https://signaturerail.com/resources/"},{"title":"Demonstrating TrainPlan Video Collection - Signature Rail","url":"https://signaturerail.com/2021/10/18/demonstrating-trainplan-video-collection/"},{"title":"On-the-Day Solutions - Signature Rail","url":"https://signaturerail.com/solutions/on-the-day/"},{"title":"Signature Rail | Modaxo's People Transportation Technology Brands","url":"https://modaxo.com/our-brands/signature-rail/"},{"title":"Providing the Rail Planning System to Succeed - Signature Rail","url":"https://signaturerail.com/providing-the-rail-planning-system-to-succeed/"},{"title":"Signature Rail | LinkedIn","url":"https://uk.linkedin.com/company/signature-rail"},{"title":"whats the best railroad design software? - the MRH Forum","url":"https://forum.mrhmag.com/post/whats-the-best-railroad-design-software-12195103"}]

Based on the search results, here's information about SignatureRail's TrainPlan and RailPlan software features and interface:

## Signature Rail Software Overview

Originating in the UK, Signature Rail has grown into a global provider of train timetable and resource planning software. The first version of TrainPlan, their flagship product, was launched in 1994.

### TrainPlan Features

TrainPlan is timetable and resource planning software for train operating companies. Signature Rail are specialists in planning software used by train operating companies to generate robust conflict-free train timetables and validated resource plans.(no content)Their solutions put users in control at every stage of the planning process, enable quick responses to changing demands, save time, and enable clear communication across the business.

Key capabilities include:
- TrainPlan allows managing data in an efficient manner, enabling safe and high performing service changes to be implemented as quickly as possible.
- The software enables planning fuelling activity and tracking fuelling distances, assigning 'uncovered trains' to ensure all train services are covered, and managing over-running engineering works.
- TrainPlan allows creating variant vehicle diagrams for managing special events.
- "It used to take my team around 10 minutes to identify conflicts which would often be the root cause of disruption – with TrainPlan it takes 10 seconds."

### Interface & Visual Features

Data processing is much quicker using Signature Rail software and the increased visual clarity on graphs produces a far more accurate result.

### RailPlan History

RailPlan began as a rewrite of a mainframe system to run on a microcomputer, and started being used by Railway Operations Consultancies as a tool to support the design of signalling.(no content)By the turn of the millennium, TrainPlan and RailPlan were being used by railway companies or consultancies on every continent except Antarctica.

### Current Product Suite

The TrainPlan and RailPlan solutions are now part of a complete Enterprise Rail suite that includes Power Modelling, Rostering, and On-the-Day management of Stock and Crew.(no content)Their systems support long-term strategic timetable planning, mid and short-term tactical adjustments to planned timetables, operational planning and 'on the day' disruption management to deliver the planned timetable.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

input.prompt: Extract all information about TrainPlan interface, features, screenshots, visualization approach, and any technical details shown in the demonstration videos
Extract all information about Signature Rail's software products, features, and technical capabilities

content.content:
# Signature Rail: Software Products & Capabilities

## Primary Product

**TrainPlan** is Signature Rail's flagship software solution, first launched in 1994. By 2000, it was deployed across passenger railway companies globally.

## Core Functionality

According to the page, Signature Rail specializes in "advanced planning software used by train operating companies to create robust, conflict-free timetables and validated resource plans."

The company provides integrated solutions that help rail operators to:
- Generate train timetable and resource plans
- Optimize capacity utilization
- Reduce vehicle and operator costs
- Improve service delivery

## Technical Approach

The company emphasizes **customized implementations**, believing that "tailored solutions to rail operators' specific requirements lead to better outcomes."

## Market Position

- **Experience**: 25+ years in the industry
- **Geography**: Primarily UK-based with global presence
- **Industry Focus**: Rail transportation sector

## Philosophical Foundation

Signature Rail operates on three core beliefs, including the conviction that "timetable planning is at the heart of a successful railway."

---

*Note: The webpage provides limited technical specifications. More detailed product information would likely be available on Signature Rail's dedicated website (signaturerail.com).*

content.content:
# TrainPlan Interface and Features

Based on the webpage content, here's what TrainPlan offers:

## Core Functionality

TrainPlan is a rail scheduling solution that **"Creates train schedules and provides planners with tools to manage timetabling across all time horizons (long-term, short-term, very short-term planning)"** including adjustments for possessions and unexpected events.

## Key Capabilities

- **Conflict validation**: The system automatically validates schedules to prevent conflicts
- **Scenario planning**: Supports "what if" analysis scenarios with extensive calendaring functionality
- **Visual and tabular displays**: Offers multiple views of service schedule information for easier modification and bulk service additions
- **Business process support**: Fully integrates with rail operator workflows

## Demonstration Videos

The collection features four video demonstrations by Adrian Gransbury covering:

1. Creating variant vehicle diagrams for special events
2. Managing over-running engineering works
3. Assigning uncovered train services to ensure complete coverage
4. Planning and tracking fuelling activities (including BI-mode fleet considerations)

## Notable Detail

The platform can track **"fuelling distances (taking into account BI-mode fleets)"**, indicating support for hybrid electric-diesel train operations.

The demonstrations emphasize ease-of-use across complex rail planning scenarios.

toolUseResult.result:
# TrainPlan Interface and Features

Based on the webpage content, here's what TrainPlan offers:

## Core Functionality

TrainPlan is a rail scheduling solution that **"Creates train schedules and provides planners with tools to manage timetabling across all time horizons (long-term, short-term, very short-term planning)"** including adjustments for possessions and unexpected events.

## Key Capabilities

- **Conflict validation**: The system automatically validates schedules to prevent conflicts
- **Scenario planning**: Supports "what if" analysis scenarios with extensive calendaring functionality
- **Visual and tabular displays**: Offers multiple views of service schedule information for easier modification and bulk service additions
- **Business process support**: Fully integrates with rail operator workflows

## Demonstration Videos

The collection features four video demonstrations by Adrian Gransbury covering:

1. Creating variant vehicle diagrams for special events
2. Managing over-running engineering works
3. Assigning uncovered train services to ensure complete coverage
4. Planning and tracking fuelling activities (including BI-mode fleet considerations)

## Notable Detail

The platform can track **"fuelling distances (taking into account BI-mode fleets)"**, indicating support for hybrid electric-diesel train operations.

The demonstrations emphasize ease-of-use across complex rail planning scenarios.

Web search results for query: ""TrainPlan" railway timetable visual graph interface"

Links: [{"title":"jTrainGraph - convenient application for train graphs and timetables","url":"https://jtraingraph.de/"},{"title":"JMRI: Timetable Tool","url":"https://www.jmri.org/help/en/html/tools/TimeTable.shtml"},{"title":"Railway Simulation","url":"https://www.opentrack.ch/mobile/opentrack_e/opentrack_e.html"},{"title":"Electronic Train Graph","url":"https://www.vizirail.com.au/vizirail"},{"title":"Travel graph used for visualising the train timetables. | Download Scientific Diagram","url":"https://www.researchgate.net/figure/Travel-graph-used-for-visualising-the-train-timetables_fig1_317421644"},{"title":"Historical Infographics: From Paris with Love","url":"https://sandrarendgen.wordpress.com/2019/03/15/data-trails-from-paris-with-love/"},{"title":"Planning Solutions - Signature Rail","url":"https://signaturerail.com/planning-solutions/"},{"title":"Graphical Timetables | RailUK Forums","url":"https://www.railforums.co.uk/threads/graphical-timetables.210627/"},{"title":"Working Timetable | The Railway Technical Website | PRC Rail Consulting Ltd","url":"http://www.railway-technical.com/operations/working-timetable.html"},{"title":"Visualising Changes to Rail Services","url":"https://chriszetter.com/blog/2018/05/11/visualizing-changes-to-rail-services/"}]

Based on the search results, I found information about railway timetable visual graph interfaces, though I didn't find a specific product called "TrainPlan." However, I found a reference to it:

## Results for "TrainPlan" Railway Timetable Visual Graph Interface

One search result mentions TrainPlan: "I've worked with TrainPlan and the fine folks in York for over 20 years. I'm not aware of any agency on this continent that has conquered an undertaking of this magnitude – schedules, crewing, equipment cycles, terminal and yard planning, passenger connections, downstream systems, etc."

The search results also reveal several related railway timetabling tools with visual graph interfaces:

### jTrainGraph
jTrainGraph is described as "the convenient and comprehensive application for train graphs and timetables." It enables users to create time-distance-graphs conveniently and display graphs both in planning mode and live mode according to specific train delays.(no content)Since version 3.1, train graphs with multiple tracks are possible, and users can open a specific train view by clicking into the train graph.

### OpenTrack
OpenTrack offers "user friendly timetable editing directly within the train graph."(no content)Users can compare timetable and actual data either in a table or directly in the train graphic, and it offers interfaces to general data formats and railway-specific formats.

### ViziRail
ViziRail allows the network geography to be defined using a Visual Geography Editor, with the geography module built on top of Locations that define control points along the network.(no content)It features a graphical planning interface for timetable generation.

### Historical Context
The first known use of this type of diagram was by Charles Ibry in the 1840s and was later used in the 1880s by E.J Marey. These are called 'train graphs' or 'Marey charts'.(no content)The horizontal axis shows time, and the vertical shows the stops. This diagram lets you compare the arrival and departure times of many services at a glance, and the slope of each line indicates relative speed of a service.

Would you like me to search more specifically for "TrainPlan" software to find more details about that particular product?


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

The search results returned general information about Gantt chart software and tools from various providers like monday.com, GanttPRO, TeamGantt, Tableau, ServiceNow, Instagantt, and Domo, but none of them mention "SignatureRail."

Here's what I found instead:

**General Gantt Chart Dashboard Information:**

Each bar in a Gantt chart represents a task, while the dates are laid out horizontally.(no content)The items are showcased in bar form, with arrow lines showing the dependencies between items. The entire view works like a grid, where the items are listed vertically against a horizontal calendar.(no content)A Gantt chart becomes even more powerful when you place it inside a dashboard alongside other supporting visualizations. While the Gantt chart gives you the timeline view, additional charts help you understand the story behind the schedule, the work being done, and the resources involved.(no content)Gantt charts display a series of horizontal lines that track completed work over time. The chart type was invented in 1910 by Henry Gantt, a mechanical engineer and management consultant.

input.prompt: Extract all information about Signature Rail resources, case studies, videos, and any interface/product details available

input.query: "Signature Rail" train scheduling software user interface demo

content.content:
# Signature Rail Resources Overview

## Available Content Types

Signature Rail's Resources section features articles, case studies, and videos covering rail industry topics.

## Featured Resources

**Articles:**
- "Looking for Lions: The Wizard of Oz and the Quest for Clean Air" - explores clean air initiatives
- "Maximising Rail Resilience with A New Approach to Procurement" - addresses pandemic-era disruptions
- "Working Collaboratively to Drive Rail Operations Recovery" - focuses on industry collaboration
- "Unleashing Data to Drive Rail Operations Recovery" - discusses digitization benefits

**Videos:**
- TrainPlan demonstration series by Adrian Gransbury covering fuelling activities, uncovered train assignments, engineering works management, and vehicle diagrams

**Case Studies:**
- Metrolinx - documents how Signature Rail supports "the largest transportation investment in Ontario's history"

## Key Topics Covered

- Carbon emissions reduction and sustainability
- Rail technology implementation
- Operational efficiency and data-driven solutions
- Train planning and resource management
- Recovery strategies post-pandemic

## Interface Details

The Resources page uses pagination, currently showing Page 1 with navigation to subsequent pages. Content displays with thumbnail images, publication dates, and brief descriptions.

**Contact Information:**
- Phone: +44 (0)1904 639091
- Email: info@signaturerail.com
- Location: York, UK

Information For Rail Career Professionals From Progressive Railroading Magazine","url":"https://www.progressiverailroading.com/internet-digital/article/Software-providers-offer-ways-to-optimize-rail-crew-scheduling-rostering-and-recordkeeping--62872"}]

Based on my search results, here's what I found about Signature Rail train scheduling software and its user interface:

## Signature Rail Overview

Signature Rail specializes in advanced planning software used by train operating companies to create robust, conflict-free timetables and validated resource plans.(no content)Originating in the UK, Signature Rail has grown into a global provider of train timetable and resource planning software. The first version of TrainPlan, their flagship product, was launched in 1994, and by 2000 it was being used by passenger railway companies across the world.

## User Interface Features

The software offers powerful graphic and tabular displays with complete display of service schedule information that simplify modification or addition of services (which can be done in bulk).

Key capabilities include:
- All data accessible in one user-friendly system, enabling lightning fast production, validation and communication of plans, with the ability to effortlessly use variant diagrams to manage special events.
- Creates train schedules and provides planners with tools to manage timetabling across all time horizons (long-term, short-term, very short-term planning), including changes required for possessions and unexpected events.
- Fully supports the rail operator's business process and automatically validates the schedule for conflicts, while providing an environment for 'what if' scenarios and extensive calendaring functionality.

## Customer Feedback on User Interface

"Data processing is much quicker using Signature Rail software and the increased visual clarity on graphs produces a far more accurate result."(no content)Customers note that "TrainPlan allows us to manage our data in an efficient manner allowing for safe and high performing service changes to be implemented as quickly as possible."

## Demo Information

I was unable to find a specific publicly available UI demo video or interactive demo for Signature Rail's TrainPlan software in the search results. You may need to contact Signature Rail directly through their website (signaturerail.com) to request a demonstration of their software interface.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.

content.text: Now I have gathered sufficient information about SignatureRail. Let me create the JSONL output file with the findings:

## Research Complete: SignatureRail Software Analysis

I have completed the research on SignatureRail railway software. Here is the summary of findings:

### Company Overview
- **Signature Rail** is a UK-based specialist in railway planning software with 30+ years of experience
- Parent company: Modaxo (part of Constellation Software)
- Global presence: UK, Norway, Sweden, Australia, USA, Canada

### Main Products

**TrainPlan** (flagship, since 1994):
- Train timetable and resource planning
- Conflict-free schedule generation
- Long-term, short-term, and very short-term planning horizons
- Automatic conflict validation
- "What if" scenario planning
- Variant vehicle diagrams for special events

**RailPlan**:
- Originally for signalling design support
- Evolved from mainframe system to microcomputer

**Enterprise Rail Suite**:
- Power Modelling
- Rostering
- On-the-Day management of Stock and Crew

### Interface/Visualization Approach
- **Dual display modes**: Graphic and tabular views
- **Train graphs** (Marey charts): Time on horizontal axis, stations on vertical
- **Visual dashboards** for real-time disruption management
- **Bulk operations** for service modifications
- Focus on "visual clarity on graphs" for accurate results

### Key Capabilities for MMS Relevance
1. Multi-horizon planning (strategic to operational)
2. Real-time disruption response with maintenance status awareness
3. Fuel/maintenance distance tracking
4. Contingency layer pre-planning
5. Train reassignment during disruptions considering driver locations

### Output File
Results saved to: `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/mms-last-attempt/subagents/results/20260106-TASK-022.jsonl`
